title: The Amateur Gentleman
writer: Jeffery Farnol, Lillie Hayward, Tom Miranda
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Dorothy Dunbar, Gardner James
plot: Barbanas Barty inherits some money, sets off to London, meets and falls in love with Lady Cleone Meredith, and this does not set well with Sir Mortiner Carnaby, who has eyes on the fair lady himself. Barnaby becomes friend with Vi...
